name: 惡毒原生家庭×被拋棄女主
description: 紀家的殘忍對待為女主的逆襲提供了最大的情緒燃料。觀眾會代入女主的委屈，等待她用實力反擊。

examples.drama_title: Witch transmigrated to ugly wife, fam hears her inner voice! rise all the way, become CEO's fave!
examples.excerpt: Dad, you mean the one who didn't believe me, kicked me out of the house, ignored 20 years of family ties, knocked me out, and dragged me to the hospital? That bastard.
examples.context: 紀家的殘忍對待為女主的逆襲提供了最大的情緒燃料。觀眾會代入女主的委屈，等待她用實力反擊。
